subject: aapl
body:
Interesting article on apple

http://www.cnbc.com/2016/01/08/apple-is-in-a-disastrous-situation-trader.htm
l

Still not feeling so great ­ lethargic and coughing a lot
I am going to attempt to see doctor first thing in the am and then work from
home if that is ok.
I may not be at my desk when market opens so I will email you in the am to
see if you want to give levels or a VWAP order that I can communicate to
Daniel and Vahe
Also need your guidance on collateral

Thank you

Rich
body_html:
Interesting article on apple 

http://www.cnbc.com/2016/01/08/apple-is-in-a-disastrous-situation-trader.html

Still not feeling so great – lethargic and coughing a lot
I am going to attempt to see doctor first thing in the am and then work from home if that is ok.
I may not be at my desk when market opens so I will email you in the am to see if you want to give levels or a VWAP order that I can communicate to Daniel and Vahe
Also need your guidance on collateral

Thank you

Rich
